panels.description: CPU usage of the monitored object
panels.title: CPU Usage

panels.description: Memory usage of the monitored object
panels.title: Memory Usage

panels.description: Average number of I/O requests processed by the system in a specified period
panels.title: IOPS

panels.description: Average number of read I/O requests processed by the system in a specified period
panels.title: Read IOPS

panels.description: Average number of write I/O requests processed by the system in a specified period
panels.title: Write IOPS

panels.description: Incoming traffic in bytes per second
panels.title: Network Input Throughput

panels.description: Outgoing traffic in bytes per second
panels.title: Network Output Throughput

panels.description: Storage space usage of the monitored object
panels.title: Storage Space Usage

panels.description: Storage space usage of transaction logs
panels.title: Transaction Logs Usage

panels.description: Storage space usage of replication slot files
panels.title: Replication Slot Usage

panels.description: Number of database connections in use
panels.title: Database Connections in Use

panels.description: Maximum number of transaction IDs that have been used
panels.title: Maximum Used Transaction IDs

panels.description: Size of transaction logs generated per second
panels.title: Transaction Logs Generation

panels.description: Lagging size of the most lagging replica in terms of WAL data received
panels.title: Oldest Replication Slot Lag

panels.description: Replication lag
panels.title: Replication Lag

panels.description: Total storage space of the monitored object
panels.title: Total Storage Space

panels.description: Used storage space of the monitored object
panels.title: Used Storage Space

panels.description: Number of bytes read from the disk per second
panels.title: Disk Read Throughput

panels.description: Number of bytes written into the disk per second
panels.title: Disk Write Throughput

panels.description: Number of processes to be written into the monitored object
panels.title: Average Disk Queue Length

panels.description: Query times of SQL statements (including stored procedures) per second
panels.title: QPS

panels.description: Execution times of submitted and rollback transactions per second
panels.title: TPS

panels.description: Percent of used PostgreSQL connections to the total number of connections
panels.title: Connection Usage

panels.description: Number of rows that are being inserted, deleted, updated, or queried
panels.title: Operation Rows

panels.description: Number of active database connections
panels.title: Active Connections

panels.description: Number of idle transaction connections
panels.title: Idle Transaction Connections

panels.description: Length of time since the start of the transaction that has been active longer than any other current transaction
panels.title: Oldest Active Transaction Duration

panels.description: Length of time since the start of the transaction that has been prepared for two-phase commit longer than any other current transaction
panels.title: Oldest Two-Phase Commit Transaction Duration

panels.description: I/O usage of disks
panels.title: Disk I/O Usage

panels.description: Number of blocked sessions
panels.title: Sessions Waiting for Locks

panels.description: Volume of data written from the swap partition to the memory per second
panels.title: Swap-In Rate

panels.description: Volume of data written from the memory to the swap partition per second
panels.title: Swap-Out Rate

panels.description: Total size of the swap partition
panels.title: Total Swap Size

panels.description: Usage of the swap partition
panels.title: Swap Usage

panels.description: Maximum age of the current database, which is the value of **max(age(datfrozenxid))** in the **pg_database** table
panels.title: Maximum Database Age

panels.description: Percentage of time that the CPU is in user mode
panels.title: User-mode CPU Time Percentage

panels.description: Percentage of time that the CPU is in kernel mode
panels.title: Kernel-mode CPU Time Percentage

panels.description: Percentage of time that the CPU is waiting for disk I/O operations to complete
panels.title: Disk I/O Wait Time Percentage

panels.description: Average latency (in milliseconds) of disks responding to read requests
panels.title: Read I/O Latency

panels.description: Average latency (in milliseconds) of disks responding to write requests
panels.title: Write I/O Latency

panels.description: Number of inactive logical replication slots
panels.title: Inactive Logical Replication Slots

panels.description: Size of WAL logs that have not been flushed to the disk by the standby node
panels.title: Size of Not Flushed WAL

panels.description: Number of slow SQL statements whose execution time is longer than 1s
panels.title: Number of SQL Statements Executed for More Than 1s

panels.description: Number of slow SQL statements whose execution time is longer than 3s
panels.title: Number of SQL Statements Executed for More Than 3s

panels.description: Number of slow SQL statements whose execution time is longer than 5s
panels.title: Number of SQL Statements Executed for More Than 5s

panels.description: Number of slow SQL statements whose execution time is longer than the value of log_min_duration_statement. You can change the value of this metric as required.
panels.title: Number of SQL Statements Executed for More Than log_min_duration_statement

panels.description:
Replication status between the primary DB instance and DR instance. The value ranges from 0 to 5.

-  0: abnormal -  1: startup -  2: catchup -  3: streaming -  4: backup -  5: stopping
panels.title: Replication Status Between Primary DB Instance and DR Instance

panels.description: Latency between the LSN of the primary DB instance and the replay LSN of the DR instance
panels.title: LSN Latency Between Primary DB Instance and DR Instance

panels.description: RTT between the primary DB instance and DR instance
panels.title: Network Latency Between Primary DB Instance and DR Instance

panels.description: Packet loss rate between the primary DB instance and DR instance
panels.title: Packet Loss Rate Between Primary DB Instance and DR Instance

panels.description: Size of WAL logs that have not been replayed by the standby node
panels.title: Size of Not Replayed WAL

panels.description: Size of WAL logs that have not been sent from the primary node to the standby node
panels.title: Size of Not Sent WAL

panels.description: Size of WAL logs that have not been written to the disk by the standby node
panels.title: Size of Not Written WAL

panels.description: Size of audit logs
panels.title: Audit Log Size

panels.description:
Stream replication status of the standby node. The value **0** indicates abnormal stream replication; **1** indicates normal stream replication; and **2** means that this node is the primary node.

For this metric, the standby node also includes read replicas.
panels.title: Stream Replication Status of Standby Node

panels.description: Time during which synchronous replication between the primary and standby nodes is blocked
panels.title: Synchronous Replication Blocking Time

panels.description: Number of temporary files generated within 1 minute
panels.title: Temporary Files per Minute

panels.description: Size of temporary files generated within 1 minute
panels.title: Temporary File Size per Minute

list.description: Datasource where the OTC Prometheus Exporter data is stored
list.label: Datasource
list.name: datasource
